rationale: Add grammar variants to cover deep‑merge, boolean conversion, hook failures, flag combos, nested templates, extra newline, repo URLs and config paths.

updates.replacement:
extra_context_object
    : '{}'
    | '{' "project_name" ':' '"Overwritten Project"' '}'
    | '{' "use_docker" ':' '"true"' '}'
    // nested dictionary for deep‑merge
    | '{' "project_name" ':' '{' "sub" ':' '"value"' '}' '}'
    // list value for deep‑merge of list variables
    | '{' "license" ':' '[' '"MIT"' ',' '"GPL"' ']' '}'
    // boolean‑style strings for prompt conversion
    | '{' "use_docker" ':' '"yes"' '}'
    | '{' "use_docker" ':' '"no"' '}'
    | '{' "use_docker" ':' '"y"' '}'
    | '{' "use_docker" ':' '"n"' '}'
    ;
